channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What we can learn from lovebirds, the rare birds that mate for life
item.description: Phoenix is believed to be home to the world's largest colony of rosy-faced lovebirds outside of their native Africa

item.title: What to know about the investigation into Nancy Guthrie's disappearance and the search for clues
item.description: Law enforcement agents have been gathering more potential evidence as the search for “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother heads into its third ...

item.title: Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrie's home during investigation into her disappearance
item.description: Law enforcement investigating the disappearance of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother have blocked off a road near Nancy Guthrie’s home in Ar...

item.title: Minneapolis left to decide future of streetside memorials to 2 people killed by federal officers
item.description: The Trump administration announced this week that its immigration crackdown in Minnesota is ending

item.title: Mandatory driver impairment sensors clear a funding hurdle, but are they ready?
item.description: A federal law requires new cars to include technology that detects drunk or impaired driving, but regulators still have not cleared it
